text.content: MAXAM Tire Completes Core Size Range for AGRIXTRA H Series

rich_text.plain_text: MAXAM Tire Completes Core Size Range for AGRIXTRA H Series

text.content: Harvester & Floater Solutions for Improved Tire Performance & Reduced Soil Compaction

rich_text.plain_text: Harvester & Floater Solutions for Improved Tire Performance & Reduced Soil Compaction

text.content: MAXAM Tire, a global leader in specialty tire manufacturing continues to prioritize the needs of modern agricultural machinery by completing the core size range for 4-wheel drive self-propelled nutrient applicators. The addition of these sizes to the AGRIXTRA H product offer allows MAXAM to further improve farmers’ and growers’ productivity for fertilizing seasons to come.

rich_text.plain_text: MAXAM Tire, a global leader in specialty tire manufacturing continues to prioritize the needs of modern agricultural machinery by completing the core size range for 4-wheel drive self-propelled nutrient applicators. The addition of these sizes to the AGRIXTRA H product offer allows MAXAM to further improve farmers’ and growers’ productivity for fertilizing seasons to come.

text.content: Developed specifically for combine harvesters and floaters, the AGRIXTRA H product family has excellent flotation properties designed to ensure reduced soil compaction and improved traction performance. Designed to withstand heavy loads and speed, this cutting-edge tire series delivers superior stability thanks to its radial casing and steel belt construction. The self-cleaning, extra-wide tread design maximizes performance on the road and in the field, delivering the utmost productivity to users.

rich_text.plain_text: Developed specifically for combine harvesters and floaters, the AGRIXTRA H product family has excellent flotation properties designed to ensure reduced soil compaction and improved traction performance. Designed to withstand heavy loads and speed, this cutting-edge tire series delivers superior stability thanks to its radial casing and steel belt construction. The self-cleaning, extra-wide tread design maximizes performance on the road and in the field, delivering the utmost productivity to users.

text.content: Employing premium rubber compounds that reduce ozone cracking and weathering, the AGRIXTRA H MS951R ensures farmers or growers will receive the value they are seeking through improved tire wear rates and fuel efficiency. In addition, MAXAM’s superior 45° lug profile provides farmers with both excellent traction and reduced slip rates while in the field or when roading. Increasing yields through minimal soil disturbance, the AGRIXTRA H features a low-pressure design to ensure farmers' and growers' crop output is protected for years to come.

rich_text.plain_text: Employing premium rubber compounds that reduce ozone cracking and weathering, the AGRIXTRA H MS951R ensures farmers or growers will receive the value they are seeking through improved tire wear rates and fuel efficiency. In addition, MAXAM’s superior 45° lug profile provides farmers with both excellent traction and reduced slip rates while in the field or when roading. Increasing yields through minimal soil disturbance, the AGRIXTRA H features a low-pressure design to ensure farmers' and growers' crop output is protected for years to come.

text.content: “By delivering the core market sizes for farmers and growers, MAXAM is committed to simplifying the buying process as a business solutions provider. The addition of the AgriXtra H 750/50R26, and 1050/50R32 allows MAXAM to complete the range of solutions for the self-propelled floater and spreader applications globally,” says Greg Gilland, Vice President of Global Agriculture at MAXAM Tire.

rich_text.plain_text: “By delivering the core market sizes for farmers and growers, MAXAM is committed to simplifying the buying process as a business solutions provider. The addition of the AgriXtra H 750/50R26, and 1050/50R32 allows MAXAM to complete the range of solutions for the self-propelled floater and spreader applications globally,” says Greg Gilland, Vice President of Global Agriculture at MAXAM Tire.

text.content: In addition to the two sizes designed for Floaters or Spreaders, Maxam is adding as well the 800/70R32 and 1250/50R32 to enhance the wide flotation product offering for the AgriXtra H family.

rich_text.plain_text: In addition to the two sizes designed for Floaters or Spreaders, Maxam is adding as well the 800/70R32 and 1250/50R32 to enhance the wide flotation product offering for the AgriXtra H family.

text.content: For more information, please contact your local representative or visit us at maxamtire.com.
